acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md gains a 0.11.0 section describing the #16 evaluation benchmark and calibration feature
dist/rigor.cjs is rebuilt from the release source and committed byte-identical to a fresh build
npm run test:all, npm run bench, claude plugin validate . --strict, and git diff --check pass
The release commit lands on main only through a protected pull request with rigor and quality checks green
rigor release-check passes on the merged main SHA before tagging v0.11.0
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
